epub.premium.defaultDescription: This capability is part of premium features and becomes available after activation.
epub.premium.lockedFormatNotice: {format} reading is a premium feature. Please activate a license to use it
epub.premium.freeFeatures.basicReading.d: Open EPUB and TXT books for free with chapter navigation and table of contents browsing (TXT is split by paragraphs).
epub.premium.freeFeatures.bookmarksAndNa: Use bookmark folders, page bookmarks, bookmark list navigation, reading position save/restore, bookshelf progress, and continuous-reading autosave for free.
epub.premium.freeFeatures.incrementalRea: Add chapters to incremental reading from the table of contents (requires the IR plugin; currently a free entry point).
epub.premium.freeFeatures.typographyAndV: Adjust layout, typography, and scrolled side page buttons for free.
Use text search, the AI panel, and reader tutorial for free.
epub.premium.freeFeatures.cardCreation.d: Fill the memory card creation window with the current selection or excerpt for free.
epub.premium.freeFeatures.excerptNotes.d: Use highlights, thoughts, excerpt export, timestamps, export templates, screenshot tools, and saved image files for free.
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.nonEpubForm: Unlock MOBI, AZW3, FB2, FBZ, CBZ, and other formats (EPUB and TXT remain free).
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.readingRefe: Reading reference point and top badge
Manually record a reference reading position and show configurable top progress ring badges in the reader.
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.styledExcer: Underline, strikethrough, wavy underline, and related display controls.
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.canvasExcer: Link Canvas mind-map excerpts and manage bindings inside the reader; works with every book format this plugin supports (EPUB, MOBI, TXT, CBZ, and more).
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.paragraphMo: Enter an immersive single-paragraph reading view with paragraph focus, font tuning, intra-paragraph paging, and cross-paragraph navigation.
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.sourceLocat: Precise excerpt-linked navigation between the reader and notes, Canvas, or cards across EPUB, MOBI, TXT, CBZ, and every other supported book format. Requires an active license.
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.footnotePre: Click footnote markers to preview content directly instead of only jumping to the source.
epub.premium.premiumFeatures.chapterExpo: Quickly export the current chapter as a Markdown file for further editing.

epub.migration.bookmarkDataPage.nothingT: No book data pages need upgrading
epub.migration.bookmarkDataPage.promptMe:
Found {count} legacy book data page(s) in {folder} (files named data_*.md).

This migration only upgrades the layout of reading-progress and bookmark save files. It does not change your excerpts, highlights, or reading notes stored elsewhere in the vault.

After you confirm, a backup is saved to the plugin folder and the upgrade starts immediately.
epub.migration.bookmarkDataPage.success: Upgraded {count} book data page(s). Backup saved (ID: {backupId}).
epub.migration.bookmarkDataPage.failed: Book data page migration failed. To recover, use backup files under the plugin folder backups/epub-bookmarks.
epub.settings.about.overviewValue: Supports highlights, EPUB deep links, Markdown export, reading progress tracking, and Weave integration for incremental reading and knowledge organization.
epub.settings.about.panelDescription: Review the current reader’s basic info, supported formats, and core capabilities in one place.
epub.settings.notifications.premiumRequi: This setting is premium. Please activate a license first.
epub.settings.basic.interfaceLanguageDes: Follow Obsidian by default, or choose a fixed plugin language so the UI does not fall back to English when Obsidian locale changes.
epub.settings.basic.showPremiumPreviewDe: When enabled, locked premium entries remain visible in settings and the reader so users can inspect feature tiers.
epub.settings.basic.bookmarkFolderDesc: Bookmark files are saved to the selected folder as a free basic capability.
epub.settings.basic.bookNotesExportTempl: When exporting excerpt notes, template files are searched only within this folder.
epub.settings.basic.bookshelfDisplayMode: Choose between follow location, detailed list, card grid, and covers only. The reader menus use the same mode.
epub.settings.basic.autoSaveReadingPosit: Automatically save the current position after continuous reading reaches the configured page count. The last position is still saved when closing the reader or switching books.
epub.settings.basic.autoSavePagesDesc: Auto-save once reading reaches this many pages. Range: {min}-{max} pages. Default: {default}.
epub.settings.basic.selectionTranslation: After selecting text in the reader, look up words or translate passages with one click. The selection is passed in the URL—no copy and paste.
epub.settings.basic.preferNativeDictiona: When enabled, desktop also tries to open Eudic via eudic://. When disabled, desktop defaults to the Eudic web dictionary.
epub.settings.basic.clipboardFallbackOnS: Copy to clipboard when open fails
If a URL scheme or external app cannot be opened, copy the selection to the clipboard for global dictionary hotkeys such as Eudic.
epub.settings.basic.customTranslationUrl: The URL must include the {query} placeholder, replaced with the URL-encoded selection. Optional {context} passes surrounding sentence context. Example: https://translate.google.com/?text={query}
epub.settings.basic.exportTemplateDesc: Manage excerpt export templates with editing, preview, and default selection.
epub.settings.basic.debugModeDesc: Enable more complete debug logs to troubleshoot footnote previews, reader rendering, and hot-reload issues.
epub.settings.basic.rebuildHighlightInde: Deletes excerpt cache and source-index files under the plugin data folder; indexes rebuild in the background the next time you open a book. Your notes, canvases, and .wdeck cards are not deleted.
Excerpt index cache cleared. Indexes will rebuild the next time you open a book.
Failed to clear the excerpt index cache. Check the console for details.
epub.settings.basic.sourceNavigationOpen: Open source notes in a new tab when locating
When jumping from the reader to Markdown, Canvas, or JSON sources, reuse an open tab when possible. When disabled, sources open in a new tab for side-by-side reading.
epub.settings.exportTemplateModal.title: Export note templates
epub.settings.exportTemplateModal.pageLa: Page numbers use the reader's resolved book page when available. If the EPUB has no page-list, the page field may be empty.

epub.settings.exportTemplateModal.saveBe: Save changes before setting as default
epub.settings.exportTemplateModal.preset: This preset template already exists. Switched to {name}.
epub.settings.exportTemplateModal.cannot: At least one template file must remain
Change the default template before deleting this file
epub.settings.exportTemplateModal.confir: Reset this built-in template to the default content?
epub.settings.license.title: License and activation
epub.settings.license.description: Supports a standalone EPUB activation code and can also inherit a valid premium license from an installed Weave plugin.
epub.settings.license.noSavableCode: No savable activation code is available for the current license
epub.settings.license.codeCopied: Activation code copied to clipboard. Please store it safely.
epub.settings.license.codeCopyFailed: Failed to copy the activation code. Please try again later.
epub.settings.license.noActivationToRemo: There is no activation record to remove
epub.settings.license.confirmRemove: Remove the current EPUB activation state?
epub.settings.license.removeAbnormal: Activation was removed but the premium state is still abnormal. Please try again later.
epub.settings.license.inheritedRemoved: Weave shared authorization was disabled and this plugin has switched to an unactivated state
epub.settings.license.removed: EPUB activation was removed and this plugin is now unactivated
epub.settings.license.removeFailed: Failed to remove activation. Please try again later.
epub.settings.license.statusCard.inherit: The current activation state comes from Weave shared authorization. To fully remove it, remove the corresponding authorization in Weave.
epub.settings.license.statusCard.freeOnl: Only free features are currently available. Activate a license to unlock all premium features.
epub.settings.license.activation.title: Activate license
epub.settings.license.activation.descrip: Enter your activation code and email to unlock premium features
epub.settings.license.activation.inputPl: Paste the full activation code here (about 500-800 characters)
epub.settings.license.activation.success: The license has been activated and premium features are now enabled
epub.settings.license.activation.deviceR: An older device activation was replaced automatically
This activation code is already bound. Enter the correct email.
An unknown error occurred during activation
epub.settings.license.activation.codeCop: Copy failed. Please copy it manually.
epub.settings.license.activation.confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the activation state? Premium features will require reactivation afterward.
epub.settings.license.activation.noActiv: There is no activation record to remove
epub.settings.license.activation.removeE: An error occurred while removing the activation state
epub.settings.license.activation.help.fo: An activation code is a long string, usually 500-800 characters, made of two parts separated by a dot.
epub.settings.license.activation.help.in: Copy the entire activation code, including every character.
Activation codes are case-sensitive, so enter them exactly.
If the code is long, pasting is recommended.
Activation codes can only be used on licensed devices.
epub.settings.license.activation.help.tr: If the format is invalid, check whether the full code was copied.
If the code has expired, contact support for a new one.
If you see an already-bound message, use the same email used at first activation. The bound email is never shown for privacy.
If repeated attempts fail, wait 15 minutes before trying again.
